gates.name: Pedestrian / Drone Data Gate
gates.evidence: 0 pedestrian/drone sources support raw t+50/t+100; audit documents why current TrajNet/ETH fallback cannot
gates.next_fix: Prepare SDD/full OpenTraj/real long pedestrian tracks.

gates.name: Hard Subset Gate
gates.evidence: 3 datasets have enough hard examples for evaluation
gates.next_fix: Mine more hard examples or increase real data.

gates.name: Deterministic Model Gate
gates.evidence: temporal model beats strongest baseline by >=5% on 1 dataset target horizons

gates.name: Hard Interaction Gate
gates.evidence: temporal model beats strongest baseline by >=10% on 1 hard subsets
gates.next_fix: Improve interaction modeling and hard training.

gates.name: Long Horizon Gate
gates.evidence: temporal model beats strongest baseline by >=5% on 1 verified t+100 sources
gates.next_fix: Need at least one robust verified t+100 win.

gates.name: Physical Validity Gate
gates.evidence: No collision/speed/acceleration degradation measured in this single-agent quick benchmark
gates.next_fix: Add multi-agent physical validity once multi-agent episodes return.

gates.name: Stability Gate
gates.evidence: max residual magnitude=0.631496, max gate alpha=0.45
gates.next_fix: Keep residual clipping/gating; reject exploding rollout.

gates.name: Cross Dataset Gate
gates.next_fix: Run leave-one-dataset-out once model is real.

gates.name: Stage 5C Readiness Gate
gates.evidence: Do not enter Stage 5C latent generative. Deterministic interaction model is not strong enough.
